globalNews.title: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon, state media says, as Iran claims deal with US near
globalNews.summary: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister says a deal to end fighting with the US is close.

globalNews.title: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
globalNews.summary: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative",  but opponents say it is a recipe for chaos.

globalNews.title: Married at First Sight Australia stars not told partners had drug and violence convictions
globalNews.summary: Stars of the hit TV show say they did not know their on-screen husbands had previous convictions.

globalNews.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
globalNews.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

globalNews.title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
globalNews.summary: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's "never sell" mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

cryptoNews.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
cryptoNews.summary: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: ETH futures flash bearish signal, but stakers’ resilience points to underlying strength
cryptoNews.summary: Demand for ETH leverage remains low, but corporate accumulation and stakers’ dedication may prevent an Ether price crash to $1,500.

cryptoNews.title: Anthropic suspends access to Fable 5, Mythos 5, citing US directive
cryptoNews.summary: Anthropic has abruptly disabled its flagship AI models after a US government directive citing national security concerns.

aiNews.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
aiNews.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

aiNews.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI

aiNews.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
aiNews.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

aiNews.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
aiNews.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
